name: AnalysisObjectPicker
summary: The AnalysisObjectPicker class can be used to prompt the user to do manual picks of analysis objects. The methods throw an exception if the user interrupts (cancels) the pick command.

constructors.name: AnalysisObjectPicker
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisObjectPicker class

methods.name: PickObject
methods.summary: Prompts the user to pick object from the model with the given prompt. Object is either analysis object or model object.

methods.name: PickObjects
methods.summary: Prompts the user to pick objects from the model with the given prompt.
